backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the DKAN/JIVATRA backend, handling bookings, user profiles, services, and site settings with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the SevaMitra app download link fix was implemented in SevaMitraBadge.tsx, with high confidence and mapped to test REQ-2.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color tokens including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the DKAN Enterprises app with bilingual SEO meta tags, Open Graph data, Google Fonts preconnect, and a root div for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with home ('/') and admin ('/admin') routes, wrapping the app in QueryClientProvider and LanguageProvider with a shared Navbar/Footer layout.
frontend/src/components/AdminPasswordGat: Frontend password gate component for the admin dashboard that checks a hardcoded password ('admin123'), persists auth state in sessionStorage, and renders children or a login form accordingly.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Service booking form component with all 36 Indian states/UTs, dynamic district fetching for select states, full validation, and bilingual (Hindi/English) labels using the language context.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Renders the Contact section with phone, address, hours, and email details fetched from settings (with fallbacks), including skeleton loading states and a WhatsApp CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, SevaMitra badge, UP Government authorization badge, quick links, and contact details pulled from settings.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Renders the full-screen hero section with the DKAN logo, tagline, UP Government badge, SevaMitra badge, stats, and Book Now/Contact CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with the DKAN logo, language toggle, desktop/mobile nav links, and admin link; hides nav links on the admin route.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays appliance repair service cards fetched from the backend, falling back to static service data, with dynamic icons, color themes, and skeleton loading placeholders.
frontend/src/components/SevaMitraBadge.t: Reusable badge component linking to the UP SevaMitra Google Play app, rendered in three visual variants (hero, footer, inline) with bilingual labels.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a grid of six customer testimonials with star ratings, review text, and author info for DKAN Enterprises, with bilingual (Hindi/English) section headers via the language hook.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Renders a fixed floating WhatsApp contact button linking to a specific phone number, with a localized label using the language hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useLanguage.ts: Provides a language context (Hindi/English) with persistence in localStorage and a toggle function, exposing the current language and setters to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend operations including bookings, services, settings, and district lookups, each using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles, Tailwind base/components/utilities, CSS custom properties for the DKAN blue-green theme (light and dark), and utility classes for brand colors and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing bookings (filter/search/status updates), services (create/delete), and business settings, using React Query hooks and bilingual (EN/HI) labels.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main public-facing page that composes Hero, Services, BookingForm, Testimonials, Contact, and WhatsAppButton components into a single layout.
frontend/src/translations.ts: Centralized bilingual (Hindi/English) translation strings for all UI sections including nav, hero, services, and booking form, exported as a typed object with a helper function.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Poppins, Noto Sans Devanagari), OKLCH-based color palette (navy, electric-green, teal), custom shadows, border radii, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the SevaMitra app, recording version, known issues (broken app download link), and the active fix feature request targeting the SevaMitraBadge download link.
